members.description: garden hose and reel visible outside
members.long_form_open_description: Plastic/metal garden hose coiled on a reel positioned outside on the patio; green hose is partially visible through the lower center panes of the glass door. Surrounded by a small outdoor area, concrete or gravel ground visible.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: seen through the glass door, outside the interior threshold and below window panes
